mapper.select: SELECT * FROM books ORDER BY book_id DESC
SELECT * FROM books WHERE category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY book_id DESC
SELECT * FROM books WHERE title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') ORDER BY book_id DESC
SELECT * FROM books WHERE 1=1 AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') AND category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY book_id DESC

SELECT * FROM books WHERE 1=1 AND title LIKE CONCAT('%', #{title}, '%') AND isbn LIKE CONCAT('%', #{isbn}, '%') AND author LIKE CONCAT('%', #{author}, '%') AND press LIKE CONCAT('%', #{press}, '%') AND category_id = #{categoryId} ORDER BY book_id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO books ( isbn, title, author, press, publish_date, category_id, total_number, available_number, description, created_at, updated_at ) VALUES ( #{isbn}, #{title}, #{author}, #{press}, #{publishDate}, #{categoryId}, #{totalNumber}, #{availableNumber}, #{description}, #{createdAt}, #{updatedAt} )
mapper.update: UPDATE books SET isbn = #{isbn}, title = #{title}, author = #{author}, press = #{press}, publish_date = #{publishDate}, category_id = #{categoryId}, total_number = #{totalNumber}, available_number = #{availableNumber}, description = #{description}, updated_at = #{updatedAt} WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
UPDATE books SET available_number = available_number + #{count} WHERE book_id = #{bookId}
